steps.t: The Glade of Three Smiling Figures is north-east of where you and Bingo camped for the night. Bingo suggested that you might need to return to the roa…
Bingo is in the Stone-trolls' Glade, in the Trollshaws.
Bingo has seen a lynx caught in a cruel trap at the Stone-trolls' Glade, and has asked you to free the poor creature.
Bingo is at the Stone-trolls' Glade, in the Trollshaws. You have freed a lynx from a cruel animal trap at Bingo's request, and should speak now to the…
Bingo wants to return to the road south-east of the Stone-trolls' Glade in order to continue his journey.
Bingo has asked you to <rgb=#FF0000>wave at the lynx</rgb> that has followed the two of you back to the road, in order to shoo it away.
Bingo is on the road south-east of the Stone-trolls' Glade, in the Trollshaws. You attempted to wave away the lynx that is following Bingo, but the cr…
Willem Whisker is on the road south-east of the Stone-trolls' Glade. You have collected some venison, and should bring it to the lynx to see if that a…
Bingo is on the road through the Trollshaws, south-east of the Stone-trolls' Glade.
The entrance to the hidden valley of Rivendell is marked on Bingo's map, in the eastern heights of the Trollshaws. Bingo is ready to travel to Rivende…
You have found the entrance to the hidden valley of Rivendell, and the sentinels eye your small party with suspicion.
Bingo is outside the entrance to the hidden valley of Rivendell.
